name: Doxycycline
description: Magungunan rigakafi na tetracycline mai girma. Maganganun ciwon ciwon baki ga marasa lafiya na penicillin. Har ila yau yana da tasiri a kan kwayoyin da ba su da kyau da kuma wasu cututtukan da ke haifar da ƙwayar cuta (malaria prophylaxis a wuraren da ke da yawa).
indications: Maganin cutar zazzabin cizon sauro a wuraren da ake fama da shi
dose: 100 MG PO kowane awanni 12 x 7 kwanaki.
window: Fara a cikin sa'o'i 3 na rauni don rigakafin rauni.
contraindications: Ciki (yana haifar da canza launin haƙorin tayi da hana haɓakar ƙashi)
warnings: RASHIN TSARI a ciki -- yi amfani da amoxicillin maimakon.
CONTRAINDICATED a yara a karkashin 8 years.
Hankalin hoto -- nasiha ga majiyyaci don gujewa faɗuwar rana.
Kada a sha tare da abinci mai wadatar calcium, antacids, ko baƙin ƙarfe - yana lalata sha.

pediatric.dose: Contraindicated a karkashin shekaru 8. Shekaru 8+: 2-4 mg/kg/rana raba q12h (max 100 mg/dose).
pediatric.note: Yi amfani da amoxicillin ga yara a ƙarƙashin 8.

obstetric.note: RASHIN CIWON ciki -- yana haifar da cutar da tayi. Yi amfani da amoxicillin maimakon.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
